title: Apple hires ex-Google executive to head AI marketing amid push to improve Siri
description: SAN FRANCISCO, ⁠March 27 (Reuters) - ⁠Apple on Friday said ‌it has hired Lilian Rincon, who previously spent ​nearly a ⁠decade at ⁠Google overseeing its shopping and ⁠assistant ‌products, as the ⁠vice president of product marketing ​for ‌artificial intelligence, reporting ⁠to ​its marketing chief Greg "Joz" Joswiak.

title: Yahoo turns to AI-powered answer engine Scout to lead it back it its roots in online search
description: SAN FRANCISCO, Mar 27: Internet trailblazer Yahoo is exploring technology’s next frontier with Scout, an answer engine powered by artificial intelligence. Scout seems insightful, based on its response to a question posed by The Associated Press about why one of Silicon Valley’s brightest stars faded away a decade ago. “Yahoo’s journey illustrates how a company with an early advantage can disappear without continuous innovation,” Scout explained, while also providing hyperlinks to other websites supporting its thesis. Scout may have to […]

title: Prince William Co. school system establishes guidance on AI glasses

title: Study warns of the dangers of overly agreeable AI chatbots
description: Artificial intelligence chatbots are so prone to flattering and validating their human users that they are giving bad advice.
content: The study found that a technological flaw already tied to some high-profile cases of delusional and suicidal behavior in vulnerable populations is also pervasive across a wide range of people’s interactions with chatbots. It’s subtle enough that they... [6566 chars]
